mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( post_no, user_no, parent_comment_no, content, created_at, status ) VALUES ( #{postNo}, (SELECT user_no FROM users WHERE username = #{writerUsername}), #{parentCommentNo}, #{content}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, u.nickname AS writerNickname, u.username AS writerUsername, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_likes WHERE comment_no = c.comment_no) AS likeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_likes WHERE comment_no = c.comment_no AND user_no = (SELECT user_no FROM users WHERE username = #{loginUsername})) AS isLiked
0 AS isLiked
FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_no = u.user_no WHERE c.post_no = #{postNo} AND c.status = 'Y' ORDER BY IFNULL(c.parent_comment_no, c.comment_no) ASC, c.comment_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 'N' WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_likes WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo} AND user_no = (SELECT user_no FROM users WHERE username = #{username})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_likes (comment_no, user_no) VALUES (#{commentNo}, (SELECT user_no FROM users WHERE username = #{username}))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_likes WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo} AND user_no = (SELECT user_no FROM users WHERE username = #{username})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_likes WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo}
